title: athyrium myer-dreesii
intro: Athyrium myer-dreesii, also known as the Myer's Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Athyrium myer-dreesii include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Athyrium myer-dreesii is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves can also be dried and used in infusions or added to salads for a nutritional boost.
